article_5.title: Principles of processing
article_5.evidence: Vault records found for 7 candidate(s). PII categories identified and removed before ranking.

article_13.title: Right to information / transparency
article_13.evidence: Explanation generated for 7 candidate(s). Each explanation includes score breakdown, verdict, and recommendation.

article_17.title: Right to erasure
article_17.evidence: 7 raw CV file(s) still present in raw_cvs/. Original CVs must be deleted manually to satisfy Art. 17. Action required: delete all files from raw_cvs/ after processing.

article_22.title: Automated decision-making safeguards
article_22.evidence: All 7 explanation(s) contain human-review language in their recommendations.

article_25.title: Data protection by design
article_25.evidence: Anonymization applied to 7 CV(s) by module0 (vault records present). Ranking performed on anonymized text for 7 candidate(s). Privacy-by-design order confirmed.

article_30.title: Records of processing activities
article_30.evidence: Full audit log generated at D:\6th sem Project\audit\audit_log.json (run ID: RUN_20260317_100300). Records of all processing activities are maintained.

remediation_required: Delete all files from raw_cvs/ after confirming anonymized_cvs/ are complete and correct.
